CREATE SCHEMA test_schema_1;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS test_schema_2;
CREATE OR REPLACE SCHEMA test_schema_1;
CREATE TABLE test_schema_1.users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE test_schema_2.orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE test_schema_1.products (product_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, product_name VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE test_schema_2.order_items (item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM test_schema_1.users u JOIN test_schema_2.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_amount FROM test_schema_1.users u JOIN test_schema_2.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.name;
SELECT product_name FROM test_schema_1.products WHERE product_id IN (SELECT product_id FROM test_schema_2.order_items WHERE order_id = 1);
CREATE SCHEMA nested_schema_1; CREATE TABLE nested_schema_1.nested_table (nested_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, nested_value VARCHAR);
CREATE OR REPLACE SCHEMA nested_schema_1;
CREATE TABLE test_schema_1.sub_orders (sub_order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
SELECT * FROM test_schema_2.orders o LEFT JOIN test_schema_1.sub_orders so ON o.order_id = so.order_id;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS large_schema_name_with_special_characters_1234;
CREATE TABLE large_schema_name_with_special_characters_1234.data (id INTEGER, info VARCHAR);
SELECT * FROM large_schema_name_with_special_characters_1234.data WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 100;
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS test_schema_1 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE test_schema_1.test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR) WITH (ENABLE_ROWID=true);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_schema_1.test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_schema_2.temp_data (temp_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, is_active BOOLEAN);
CREATE TABLE test_schema_2.report_data (report_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, report_date DATE);
SELECT td.temp_id, rd.report_id FROM test_schema_2.temp_data td JOIN test_schema_2.report_data rd ON td.temp_id = rd.report_id WHERE td.is_active = TRUE;
